name: pm-solution-design
description: Use when starting a new feature or product initiative that needs a structured PRD, or when requirements are ambiguous and need clarification before development.

interface.shortDescription: Structured PRD output driven by four gates
interface.longDescription: Drive structured PRD output through four gates (problem clarity → solution closure → executable contract → cost assessment). Use when starting a new feature or product initiative, or when requirements are ambiguous and need clarification.
